title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. alpestris
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. alpestris, also known as alpine kidney vetch or mountain kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other kidney-related issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving urinary function, and supporting the overall health of the urinary system. In herbal preparations, alpine kidney vetch can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
